_meta.purpose: MN568 regression baseline — the canonical expected output of the siding takeoff for the MN568 reference project. Any change to calculation, pricing, n8n workflows, or schema must be validated against this file via scripts/validate-mn568-baseline.ts before merge.
_meta.status: BASELINE — captured 2026-04-27 from takeoff 1cca55ae-64e4-42ee-b6fc-241cbd92df53. This is a frozen snapshot of CURRENT system behavior, reviewed by Anthony Hutchinson for regression protection before Phase 1. NOT a claim of business-correctness or contractor-final approval — the values are what the system produces today, not what business logic says is right.
_meta.sign_off: Reviewed as current working MN568 output baseline before Phase 1 stabilization. Not business-validated; regression-protection only.
notes: Baseline captures current system behavior, not final business-correct estimating logic.
trim_lf is using belly_band detection total_perimeter_lf = 95.93.
presentation_group_totals maps Architectural Details into trims for canonical 7-group baseline.
labor and overhead are tracked separately and are not included in presentation_group_totals.
fields_documented: project — { id, name }; identifies the project this baseline represents
detection_counts — keyed by detection class (window, door, garage, gable, corbel, ...); integer counts per class
net_siding_sf — facade_sqft − openings_sf + gable_sf, the post-deduction siding area
trim_lf — total trim linear footage across all trim categories
siding_squares — net_siding_sf / 100, rounded per the production formula
material_subtotal — sum of material_extended across all line items, before overhead and markup
labor_subtotal — sum of labor_extended across all line items, before L&I and overhead
overhead_subtotal — overhead applied (mobilization, port-a-john, insurance, L&I)
markup_percent — final markup applied (typically 0.26 from MARKUP_RATE constant)
final_total — material + labor + overhead + (markup × subtotal); the customer-facing number
line_item_count — total count of rows in takeoff_line_items for this takeoff
presentation_group_totals — total_extended summed per canonical presentation_group (7 groups)
_meta.epsilon_policy: Default validator epsilon is 0 (exact match required). For floating-point fields, pass --epsilon to allow tolerance (e.g. 0.01 for cent-level rounding). detection_counts and line_item_count are always integer-compared (no epsilon).
